title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Accenture India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Accenture India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
